text.title: OKR Setting Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying OKR Setting. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: draft-krs-per-objective
step.action: Write 2-4 numeric outcome KRs per objective.

step.name: instrument-or-confirm
step.action: Verify each KR is measurable end-to-end.

step.name: schedule-checkins
step.action: Book biweekly check-in slot through quarter.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
